positive: A stylized, high-contrast illustration of a mythical celestial dragon coiled around a crescent moon. The dragon features flowing, tribal-inspired scales in deep indigo and turquoise, contrasted by glowing gold accents and starburst patterns. The moon radiates soft, ethereal light, illuminating scattered, geometrically patterned constellations (e.g., nebula dust, stylized stars). The overall composition should be symmetrical and central, ideal for a repeat pattern or large graphic print. Minimalist yet highly detailed line work, vector art aesthetic mixed with deep engraving style. Limited color palette focused on rich blues, golds, and black. Clean silhouette, dramatic negative space, centered composition, maximalist design elements.
